_note: Each theme uses a 3-stop vertical gradient (top → mid → bottom). Mid is the glow centre.

mainMenu.comment: Vivid cosmic — dark purple void / bright indigo glow

student.comment: Electric blue — deep navy void / vivid cobalt glow

attendant.comment: Vivid cyan — dark teal void / bright cyan glow

maintenance.comment: Neon green — dark forest void / vivid green glow

admin.comment: Vivid red — deep crimson void / bright scarlet glow

cafeteriaManager.comment: Vivid yellow — dark gold void / bright yellow glow
